appstore.label: App Store screenshot kit
appstore.description: Three iPhone-sized pages (6.7", 6.5", 5.5") with six artboards each — re-skin every screenshot from one shared vars block.

producthunt.label: Product Hunt asset kit
producthunt.description: Gallery slide, thumbnail, hunter banner, and Maker-comment social card — everything you need for a launch.

social-media.label: Social media kit
social-media.description: Twitter banner, X profile, LinkedIn cover, Instagram square, Instagram story, and Bluesky banner — one vars block re-skins all six.

talks.label: Conference talk kit
talks.description: 16:9 title slide, per-section dividers, and a thank-you / contact closer — ready for your next talk.

personal.label: Personal homepage kit
personal.description: OG image, favicon, /now hero, and blog-post header template — the four assets every personal site needs.

live.label: LiveRefresh demo kit
live.description: Four LiveRefresh artboards at distinct rhythms — clock, fast counter, time-of-day greeter, and an animated-export demo card.
